title: prunus × keiozakura
intro: Prunus × keiozakura, also known as the Keio Zakura cherry blossom tree, is a hybrid species of the Prunus genus, resulting from the cross between Prunus lannesiana and Prunus serrulata. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Prunus × keiozakura include its potential to reduce cardiovascular risk, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Prunus × keiozakura is often prepared as a herbal tea, extract, or supplement, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health benefits.
